text.title: Backstage Developer Portal Deployment Core Rules
text.summary: 6 testable rules including a `skip-this-methodology` rule. Each pairs a binary check with sourced rationale.

rule.statement: Backstage MUST be staffed as a product with a named owner + ≥0.5 FTE; deploying without ownership is rejected.
rule.rationale: Operational rationale tying the rule to the cited source.

rule.statement: Every onboarded service MUST have a `catalog-info.yaml` with `owner`, `tier`, `lifecycle`; orphans rejected from the catalog.
rule.rationale: Operational rationale tying the rule to the cited source.

rule.statement: Plugins MUST be added via a vetted allowlist with security review; unrestricted plugin install is rejected.
rule.rationale: Operational rationale tying the rule to the cited source.

rule.statement: Backstage MUST be upgraded at least every 2 weeks (minor) and 1 month (major); staying ≥3 versions behind is rejected.
rule.rationale: Operational rationale tying the rule to the cited source.

rule.statement: TechDocs source MUST live next to source code (mkdocs.yml + docs/); manual upload is rejected.
rule.rationale: Operational rationale tying the rule to the cited source.

rule.statement: Skip when service count <10 OR no dedicated platform owner.
rule.rationale: Operational rationale tying the rule to the cited source.
